notes: 3.35 (live server/UI, no node update needed): fixes the per-node worker steppers — the CPU/GPU +/- controls on each node card used to write the GLOBAL setting, so changing one node's counts changed every node. They're now per-node: each stepper reads that node's override (falling back to the global default) and saves to that node's config only. Blue value = per-node override active. Removed the redundant worker-count text fields from Per-Node Overrides. Node 2.27 unchanged (Transcode CPU box works via GPU+CPU sum, ETA wall-clock fallback, error-85-proof remap, 10s source-stat timeout).
